command: # Testing non-numeric values in arithmetic transformations
set test.val 3
eval echo {global.test.val|assert nonEmpty Value is expected to be non-empty}
exit
# Testing non-numeric values in arithmetic transformations
eval echo {global.test.val|assert nonEmpty Value is expected to be non-empty}
exit

cerr: Value is expected to be non-empty
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::runtime_error'
what():  assert nonEmpty: JSON value is null

command: # Testing non-numeric values in arithmetic transformations
set test.val[0] 3
eval echo {global.test.val|assert type array Value is expected to be an array|at 0}
exit
# Testing non-numeric values in arithmetic transformations
set test.val 3
eval echo {global.test.val|assert type array Value is expected to be an array}
exit

cerr: Value is expected to be an array
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::runtime_error'
what():  assert type array: JSON value is not an array
